quote.msg:
整左個python program 想由yahoo finance 攞哂sp500 stock price data 做analysis
但係唔知邊度出左問題 攞唔到全部data
求高手教教我

import requests
from bs4 import BeautifulSoup
import pandas as pd
import datetime
from pandas_datareader import data as pdr
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

replies.msg:
def get_sp500_list():
    rows=[]
    URL="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_S%26P_500_companies"
    page = requests.get(URL).text
    soup = BeautifulSoup(page,'html')
    table = soup.find('table')
    line= table.find_all('tr')
    for i in range(1,len(line)-1):
        rows.append([line[i].find_all('td')[0].text.rstrip("\n"),line[i].find_all('td')[1].text.rstrip("\n"),line[i].find_all('td')[3].text.rstrip("\n"),line[i].find_all('td')[4].text.rstrip("\n")])
    tickers = pd.DataFrame(rows, columns=["Ticker", "Name","Sector","Sub Industry"])
    return tickers

整左個python program 想由yahoo finance 攞哂sp500 stock price data 做analysis

import requests
from bs4 import BeautifulSoup
import pandas as pd
import datetime
from pandas_datareader import data as pdr
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

def get_sp500_list():
    rows=[]
    URL="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_S%26P_500_companies"
    page = requests.get(URL).text
    soup = BeautifulSoup(page,'html')
    table = soup.find('table')
    line= table.find_all('tr')
    for i in range(1,len(line)-1):
        rows.append([line[i].find_all('td')[0].text.rstrip("\n"),line[i].find_all('td')[1].text.rstrip("\n"),line[i].find_all('td')[3].text.rstrip("\n"),line[i].find_all('td')[4].text.rstrip("\n")])
    tickers = pd.DataFrame(rows, columns=["Ticker", "Name","Sector","Sub Industry"])
    return tickers

replies.msg:
def get(tickers, startdate,enddate):
    def data(ticker):
        return (pdr.get_data_yahoo(ticker,start=startdate,end=enddate))
    datas = map(data,tickers)
    return(pd.concat(datas,keys=tickers,names=['Ticker','Date']))

tickers = get_sp500_list()

all_data = get(tickers['Ticker'].values.tolist(),datetime.datetime(2020,1,1),datetime.datetime(2020,3,13))
